description_long: This armchair features a semi-circular, wraparound backrest and armrests, all upholstered in rich, dark brown leather with a slightly glossy finish. The seat is generously padded and tufted, providing a plush and comfortable sitting area. The backrest is supported by a series of turned wooden spindles, adding a classic and ornate touch to the design. The front edge of the seat and the armrest ends are adorned with intricate carved wooden detailing, enhancing its vintage aesthetic. Four sturdy, turned wooden legs support the chair, each with a traditional, decorative profile. The overall construction suggests a blend of luxury and durability, suitable for upscale urban interiors or stylish public spaces.
description: A vintage-style armchair with a tufted leather seat, semi-circular padded backrest, ornate wooden carvings, and turned wooden legs.
description_view_0: The rear view highlights the curved, padded leather backrest and the decorative wooden spindles beneath it.
description_view_1: The left side view shows the thickness of the leather upholstery and the ornate wooden carvings on the armrest end and seat edge.
description_view_2: The front view displays the tufted leather seat, detailed wooden carvings, and the open, semi-circular backrest supported by spindles.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, emphasizing the padded armrest and the carved wooden details.
attribute_armrest_design: padded and upholstered, semi-circular, integrated with backrest, leather covering
attribute_backrest_style: semi-circular, low, padded and upholstered, supported by turned wooden spindles
